---
title: "help_page_1"
author: "Edward"
date: "2025-03-04"
output: html_document
---

<div style="color:green; ">
What is the GAM-MAP?
</div>

The **GAM-Based Malaria Analytics Platform (GAM-MAP)** is an interactive tool for analysing uncomplicated malaria patterns and climate relationships across Ghana's former ten regions from 2012–2023.

<div style="color:green; ">
First Time Users:
</div>

1. Start with the **Welcome** tab to understand the app's purpose
2. Review the **About** tab for project background and study area
3. Explore the **Analysis** tab to interact with data
4. Visit the **Appendix** tab for additional plots and technical details.


---
